_comment: FROZEN docsync-gate PreToolUse guard (A2). hooks-ensure-infra.md MERGES this single entry into the consumer's .claude/settings.json hooks.PreToolUse array — it never overwrites the file or other hooks. The `if` field uses permission-rule syntax to filter to Bash calls whose command matches `git commit *`, so the script (hooks/docsync-gate.sh) only ever runs at the one moment it matters — every other Bash call, and every other tool, never reaches it. Command path is $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR-relative so it resolves from any cwd inside the repo.
